strengths: Strong SQL and Python ETL automation
Proven process automation reducing manual work
Data governance and quality framework implementation
weaknesses: No explicit CPQ or deal desk experience
improvement_bullets: Managed CRM data integrity and system governance, mirroring the rigor required for Salesforce CPQ environments by implementing automated validation workflows to ensure quote accuracy and deal desk compliance.
Streamlined sales operations by mapping complex pricing logic and commission structures into automated reporting models, reducing manual entry and providing clear visibility into incentive payouts.
Acted as the primary operational liaison between technical teams and GTM stakeholders, translating complex field requirements into functional system improvements across Salesforce and CRM platforms.
Leveraged AI-driven tools (e.g., Python/LLMs) to prototype automated reporting solutions and audit data anomalies, effectively acting as a QA layer for GTM system outputs.

Partnered with leadership to design and maintain recurring GTM analytics packs, standardizing the 'single source of truth' for reporting to support quarterly business reviews and stakeholder decision-making.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the GTM Senior Analyst opportunity with HHAeXchange. I am interested in this opportunity because of HHAeXchange’s commitment to building a comprehensive homecare ecosystem that empowers providers and patients alike. What interests me about working for HHAeXchange is its position as the leading technology platform in a sector that is increasingly vital to our aging population; the chance to apply technical rigor to the complexities of home and community-based care is exactly the challenge I am looking for. I believe my background in data-driven operations and my proficiency in building scalable automation pipelines would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data integrity and operational efficiency to bridge the gap between technical backends and business strategy. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was causing significant data mismatches. I architected a new workflow using Power BI and Python automation to ingest CRM data, which not only reduced data errors but saved the team 8 hours of manual entry per week. Ultimately, I know that the GTM Senior Analyst role at HHAeXchange would allow me to bring my expertise in data governance and workflow optimization to the critical task of maintaining Salesforce hygiene and quote-to-close compliance. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my cross-functional communication and stakeholder management skills. I regularly translated complex technical findings into actionable business recommendations for leadership, ensuring everyone from Sales to Operations was aligned on key performance indicators. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in systems automation in working on pricing escalations and deal desk support at HHAeXchange. I know that my analytical precision and ability to build automated, user-friendly reporting tools align with what it takes to succeed in the GTM Senior Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
